summary: Kim Ha-Jin strategically engages with Deputy Guildmaster Yun Seung-Ah, feigning disinterest to pique her curiosity further. He proceeds to experiment with his Stigma magic, manifesting it into a dagger, and tests his 'Observation and Browsing' skill along with the 'Book of Truth' to confirm his height. An emergency alarm then signals the commencement of "The Cube Missing People Incident," a critical storyline involving six missing cadets and foreshadowing Yoo Yeonha as a future target. Later, a confrontation unfolds during training between Kim Soo-Ho and Shin Jong-Hak, with Chae Nayun advising against intervention. The chapter concludes with the announcement of written test results, showing Kim Ha-Jin ranked first, followed by Rachel and Shin Jong-Hak.
key_moments: Kim Ha-Jin strategically interacts with Deputy Guildmaster Yun Seung-Ah, then tests his new Stigma and 'Book of Truth' abilities.
An emergency alarm signals the start of "The Cube Missing People Incident," a major storyline involving missing cadets and identifying Yoo Yeonha as a future target.
The written test results are announced, with Kim Ha-Jin ranking first, followed by Rachel and Shin Jong-Hak.
